steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content:
The $5y$ and $-5y$ terms cancel if the equations are added.
$$(5y)+(-5y)=(10x+11)+(5x-21)$$
$$0=15x-10$$

steps.title: Scale to the requested value
steps.content:
From $0=15x-10$, add $10$ to both sides.
$$15x=10$$
The question asks for $30x$, so double both sides.
$$30x=2(10)$$
The answer is 20.
